title: Day Sleep
description: Now your character can sleep during the day to fast-forward time.
body:
**A tiny vanilla+ mod that allows players to sleep during the day to accelerate time.**

## What It Does

- Allows players to sleep during daytime
- Time accelerates smoothly
- Multiplayer friendly
- Zero gameplay clutter

## Uses

**Sometimes you:**

- Want crops to grow faster
- Need villagers to restock
- Are waiting for a redstone timer
- Just don’t want to AFK

## Multiplayer Behavior

No issues with servers and only one person needs to rest to fast-foward time during the day

## Modpacks
You are free to use this mod in any modpack!!!
